title: Terry-cloth puppy — new eyes and restuff
description: This puppy plush was missing both eyes. We fitted replacement eyes, deep cleaned the terry cloth, and restuffed for a bright, even look.
itemDetails: A terry cloth tan puppy plush belongs to softer baby-safe plush categories where looped or towel-like textures are used for tactile comfort. This style has been common in infant and toddler gift lines since at least the 1990s. Construction typically uses cotton/poly terry or terry-like polyester fabric with soft fill and embroidered features.
repairDetails: This terry-cloth tan puppy was missing its eyes and had tired stuffing. We replaced the eyes, deep cleaned the fabric, and restuffed so the face and body look correct again.

googleReview.quote: Took my girlfriends 20 year old teddy to be fixed very last minute and i was able to be fit in so quickly. my girlfriends teddy was ready the next day and looked identical to how he was years ago. couldn't recommend them any higher — thank you guys
